zh.lifeSummary: 當Berthe Beatrix van Gavere於大約1143年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維時，她的父親Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders32歲，母親Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem18歲。她和EUSTACHE DE ROEULX III至少有1個兒子。她去世於1186年在英國英格蘭享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berthe Beatrix van Gavere于大约1143年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫加維时，她的父亲Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders32岁，母亲Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem18岁。她和EUSTACHE DE ROEULX III至少有1个儿子。她去世于1186年在英国英格兰享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gavere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Francois, Michel.

variants.name: Lariviere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Normand, Fernand, Marcel, Adelard, Andre, Gaston, Philibert, Aime, Alcide, Alphonse, Antoine.
habitational name from any of numerous places in various parts of France named Larivière or La Rivière, from Old French riviere ‘river, shore’.

nameMeanings.name: Berthe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Berthe Beatrix van Gavere was born about 1143, in Gavere, East Flanders, Belgium, her father, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, was 32 and her mother, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, was 18. She had at least 1 son with EUSTACHE DE ROEULX III. She died in 1186, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berthe Beatrix van Gavere est née environ 1143, à Gavere, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec EUSTACHE DE ROEULX III. Elle est décédée en 1186, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berthe Beatrix van Gavere um 1143 in Gavere, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders 32 und ihre Mutter Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem 18. Sie hatte mit EUSTACHE DE ROEULX III mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1186 im Alter von 44 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berthe Beatrix van Gavere è nata il circa 1143 nel Gavere, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, sua padre, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con EUSTACHE DE ROEULX III. Morì nel 1186, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Berthe Beatrix van Gavereが約1143年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンガバーで生まれた時，父Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flandersは32歳，母Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghemは18歳であった。彼女はEUSTACHE DE ROEULX IIIとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1186年にイギリスイギリスで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Berthe Beatrix van Gavere(이)가 대략 1143년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 게이버에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 EUSTACHE DE ROEULX III(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1186년 영국 잉글랜드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berthe Beatrix van Gavere nasceu aproximadamente 1143, em Gavere, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com EUSTACHE DE ROEULX III. Ela faleceu em 1186, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berthe Beatrix van Gavere родилась около 1143 г. в местности гавир, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, её отцу по имени Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, 18. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от EUSTACHE DE ROEULX III. Она умерла в 1186 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.

sm.entre 1160 et 1172: mai le 1160 e o'o I le 1172

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berthe Beatrix van Gavere nació aproximadamente 1143, en Gavere, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Rasse III Van Gavere Lord of Chieves Count of Everghem Baron of Flanders, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Eva Ida Chievres Dormison de Peteghem, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con EUSTACHE DE ROEULX III. Murió en 1186, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años.
